title: NodeAcceleration
description: NodeAcceleration: Resulting acceleration and angular acceleration for a Node.

UX.description: Acceleration in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Acceleration measured in [m/s²].

UY.description: Acceleration in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Acceleration measured in [m/s²].

UZ.description: Acceleration in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Acceleration measured in [m/s²].

RX.description: Rotational acceleration about the X-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularAcceleration measured in [rad/s²].

RY.description: Rotational acceleration about the Y-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularAcceleration measured in [rad/s²].

RZ.description: Rotational acceleration about the Z-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularAcceleration measured in [rad/s²].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Orientation.description: Defines the directionality of the results. Defaults to global XYZ. Basis: An ordered set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors defining three-dimensional orientation in space

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
